cards.title: Accuracy
cards.description: Percent correct over the last 7 days.

cards.title: Mastery Growth
cards.description: Average movement across targeted skills.

cards.title: Pace
cards.description: Median time per question compared with target.

cards.title: Confidence
cards.description: Student self-rating before and after a set.

cards.title: Next Best Skill
cards.description: App-selected skill with the highest expected gain.
